economic_notes: Controlled entities include Kebaowek Land Management Inc., Amik Nikewin Development Inc., Kitika Nijwaswi L.P. (which owns Mikan Transport L.P. and Mitikon L.P.). Migizy Odenaw Inc. is fully consolidated. Economic development expenses of $3,271,154. First Nation guarantees personal housing mortgages of $1,422,687 and loans in Mikan Transport L.P. ($1,322,605) and Mitikon L.P. ($115,027).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) inability to observe physical inventory of Mitikon L.P. as of March 31, 2022 and 2021; (2) three controlled entities (Kebaowek Land Management Inc., Kitika Nijwaswi L.P., and Amik Nikewin Development Inc.) were not consolidated but accounted for by modified equity method, contrary to PSAS requirements. The financial statements include ISC reconciliation as required. OSR is negative because revenue lines include large deferred revenue adjustments and ISC unexpended funding movements that net out government transfers. isc_funding calculated as sum of ISC Flexible + Fixed + Set + Block contributions ($7,209,858 + $3,411,112 + $447,500 + $4,854,398 = $15,922,868) plus ISC unexpended from prior year ($4,235,320) less ISC unexpended to following year (-$11,792,112) = $8,366,076 net recognized; however gross ISC lines total $15,922,868. total_government_transfers includes ISC lines, CMHC, Federal other, FNEC, FNQLHSSC, Government of Quebec, FNHRDCQ, Ministère des Forêts, Secrétariat aux affaires autochtones, Provincial/federal police, plus deferred revenue and unexpended funding movements. Province is QC (Quebec) based on auditor location in Amos, Quebec and references to Secrétariat aux affaires autochtones.
